channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 35b96aac-d839-4362-abd4-7381f2b27ccd
Display name: Group-XTenantIdentitySync.Read.All
Description: Read all Group Cross-Tenant Identity Synchronization properties
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/35b96aac-d839-4362-abd4-7381f2b27ccd

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 5639c449-cfd9-4088-bc48-3e16da108bf8
Display name: User.ReadUpdate.All
Description: Read and update users
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/5639c449-cfd9-4088-bc48-3e16da108bf8
